modules.name: Core Systems
modules.description: Time, moon, movement, death/tomb, difficulty, scoreboards. Required by everything.

modules.name: Dream Rate
modules.description: Custom RNG system that ties your entire journey together. DR calculation, breakdown, milestones.

modules.name: Crate & Loot
modules.description: Crate animation, structure loot, treasure system, fishing/harvest crates.

modules.name: Artifacts
modules.description: 408 artifacts, 28 armor sets, accessories, rings, abilities, codex, constellations, patina.

modules.name: Weapon Classes
modules.description: 14 weapon classes with unique mechanics. Standalone version uses generic weapon appearances.
modules.standaloneNote: Generic weapon names/textures with glint. Includes mastery and glyphforge.

modules.name: Mastery Systems
modules.description: Weapon and armor mastery, awakening stones, enchant progression, prestige.

modules.name: Advantage Trees
modules.description: 13 skill trees, 67 prestige abilities, cosmetics. Standalone codex: 'Advantage Tree'.

modules.name: Companions
modules.description: 102 companions, combat, evolution, pet duels, mount training, tamed bonds, wild companions.

modules.name: Quests & Bounties
modules.description: 250 quests, village reputation, bounty board, village specialization, exile.

modules.name: Dungeons, Raids & Castle
modules.description: Village dungeons, spirit raids (13 bosses), infinite castle, heist. Bundled together.

modules.name: Cooking
modules.description: Campfire GUI, 7 mastery categories, seasonal recipes, pantry storage.

modules.name: Housing & Laborers
modules.description: Hearthstone zones, 5 upgrade tiers, quick stash, laborers, satchels.

modules.name: Guilds
modules.description: Guild stone, warp, expeditions, donations, diplomacy. Standalone codex: 'Guild Book'.

modules.name: Social & Family
modules.description: Friends, marriage, duels, parties (9 combos), competitions.

modules.name: Lore & Discovery
modules.description: 904 lore fragments, journal, 6 anecdotes, campfire stories, inscriptions.

modules.name: Travel Network
modules.description: Guidestones, portal dial, wormhole, armored elytra.

modules.name: Spirit Weapons
modules.description: 14 legendary weapons, metamorphosis, spirit tome (100 quests), dream storm crystal.

modules.name: CraftForever
modules.description: Trade trials, artisan forge, spirit tools (7 tiers), grand forge, artisan tome.

modules.name: World & Mobs
modules.description: Seasons, calendar, world events, patrons, furia, health bars, night terrors, biome mastery.

modules.name: Professions
modules.description: 12 custom villager professions, biome-specific village names, daily spotlight.

modules.name: Bestiary
modules.description: 52 mob types tracked, kill bonuses, 5-page GUI. Standalone codex: 'Bestiary Log'.

modules.name: Milestones
modules.description: Personal milestones replacing achievements. Standalone codex: 'Milestone Log'.

modules.name: Cosmetics
modules.description: 36 cosmetics (18 particles, 18 titles), trim effects. Standalone codex: 'Cosmetic Menu'.

modules.name: Gacha Fountain
modules.description: Dreamdust fountain, 114 weighted reward pool functions.

modules.name: Black Market
modules.description: Buy/sell/listings tabs, netherite economy, daily deals, heist parkour.

modules.name: Dreaming Realm
modules.description: Solo challenge arena triggered on sleep. Maze, guardians, final trial.

modules.name: Buddy System
modules.description: Bond with tamed vanilla mobs across 7 tiers. Best buddy combat and equipment.

edges.reason: Taskmaster tree bonus on quest completion
DR triggers dream chance on sleep
